title: Increase question-specific EDA depth
reason: Thin EDA makes memos feel generic.

title: Tighten planner routing
reason: Planner misclassifications reduce trust and lead to irrelevant workflows.

title: Harden candidate-search activation
reason: Users asking what to add should consistently get screened candidates.

title: Classify and reduce degraded-mode runs
reason: Frequent warnings indicate reliability or coverage gaps.
